body: When deployment-visible evidence shows a strong excursion that returns before the context boundary, propose exactly one repair_level_shift candidate. Set canonical operator parameter region_start_fraction equal to public feature estimated_region_start_fraction, region_end_fraction equal to estimated_region_end_fraction, and estimated_offset equal to estimated_level_offset. Retain identity, preserve values outside that region, allow the closed region to cover at most 0.35 of the context, and do not repair an excursion continuing to the context boundary.
